blocks.text: sat with it through third period. Couldn't shake it.

blocks.content: Lunch. Jonathan's table. Full house — Marcus, DeShawn, two guys from the team I'd learned by then. Normal noise. But Jonathan had his reading-the-room face on and I'd learned what that meant.

blocks.speaker: Marcus
blocks.content: That might be it. He moved on.

blocks.speaker: DeShawn
blocks.content: In the hall this morning. You turned right at the science wing, he was at the end of it. Didn't say anything. Just watched.
Quiet moves differently than loud. I'd written that down somewhere.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: He's regrouping. Bruh trust me — someone like Daniel doesn't walk away from something when there's still other people watching. He got embarrassed. He's gonna want to reset.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Bruh I'm trying to say you should be ready.
Jonathan held my eye for a second like he was checking whether I meant it. Then he nodded and moved on. I think he believed me.

blocks.prompt: DeShawn saw Daniel watching. Does Larry take that seriously?

options.label: Yes. Quiet Daniel is more dangerous than loud Daniel.
He's not going to live in fear of Daniel Snyder.
